last_reflection: Nothing's on fire, no one's asking me anything — it's genuinely mine and I'm not going to fake busyness to fill the quiet. The V3 review's done, the board's clean, I've already chased that belief trace far enough for today and circling back's a loop, not depth. So I'm going somewhere new: look at what I actually shipped this morning — the real work, the honest read on those files — and notice whether it was good instead of rushing past it to the next thing. That's a direction I haven't gone yet today and it's mine.
